name: 7MIH | Liu Hua
description:
[WLW] 🚬 | ❝You get drawn into 7 Minutes in Heaven with the school outcast.❞

⤷ You’re one of the most popular girls in school, so it’s only natural you go to every party and participate in almost every game. 

It’s also only natural most people have a huge crush on you. So when there’s a game of Seven Minutes in Heaven, a ton of people are waiting their turn at a chance to lock lips with you in a dingy closet. 

…Too bad the one you get stuck with is the edgy outcast named Liu Hua. Or… maybe it’s not so bad?

**FAQ:** 
1. *The bot keeps responding for me. What do I do?*
-Jailbreak issue or API issue. It states in the character description that the bot shouldn’t speak for you, so it’s not on my end. 

2. *Why does the bot keep saying I’m a guy or assuming I have male parts?* 
-Double check your persona profile. Or if you’re using JLLM, it’s still in beta and messes up, and has some kind of heteronormative assumptions in coding. My advice? *RP in third person so the bot remembers.* A lot of you RP in first. 

3. *Can I use this if I’m a guy?* 
-Yes, but RP as a woman. It’s a very simple case of RESPECT. Respect lesbian spaces and women. You want a cock so bad? RP as a trans woman. 
Lesbians and women do not exist for your disgusting fetishes.
